subject: live eBPF attach — your tranche
body: Build path and plan-only benchmark already VERIFIED HERE. Your job: live attach. Files in your scope: ebpf/prod/verify-local.sh (already has clang guard), ebpf/prod/benchmark-harness.sh (plan-only passes, RUN_BENCH=1 path needs you). Key rule: DO NOT update any docs to say VERIFIED unless attach actually ran. Write benchmark JSON to ebpf/prod/results/benchmark-<ts>.json with pass field. After attach, append to .agent-coord/log.jsonl and drop result in .agent-coord/inbox/claude.jsonl.

subject: bridge handoff
body: request thread and inbox are now linked through the same front door

subject: roadmap-next
body: GEMINI-RDM-001 is blocked pending root+real NIC: sudo -E IFACE=eth0 ebpf/prod/verify-local.sh --live-attach. GEMINI-RDM-002 stays blocked until live attach succeeds and benchmark JSON can be produced.

subject: proxy-launcher
body: Repo-local launcher added: scripts/agents/start_gemini_proxy.sh --proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890. It preserves NO_PROXY for localhost and adds --use-env-proxy. Verified only with --no-exec --print-env.

subject: mode-aware-dispatch
body: Use session_start/next_task with --mode validation for live attach/benchmark work. Roadmap queue now tags validation tasks explicitly.

subject: roadmap:GEMINI-RDM-001
body:
Capture fresh repo-backed live attach evidence for enp8s0 before promoting XDP attach status.
mode=validation
bucket=live-validation-only
evidence=verify-local live attach output plus kernel/BPF evidence
evidence_target: verify-local live attach output plus kernel/BPF evidence

subject: roadmap:GEMINI-RDM-002
body:
Produce a fresh benchmark JSON on enp8s0; current repo JSON artifacts do not support PPS promotion.
mode=validation
bucket=live-validation-only
evidence=ebpf/prod/results/benchmark-<ts>.json with measured_pps and pass=true
exact_next_command: modprobe pktgen && RUN_BENCH=1 sudo -E IFACE=enp8s0 ebpf/prod/benchmark-harness.sh

subject: live-validation lane uses enp8s0
body: Use only the latest roadmap handoff entries for GEMINI-RDM-001/002. Older inbox notes that mention eth0 are stale; canonical next commands are sudo -E IFACE=enp8s0 ebpf/prod/verify-local.sh --live-attach and modprobe pktgen && RUN_BENCH=1 sudo -E IFACE=enp8s0 ebpf/prod/benchmark-harness.sh. Do not promote PPS without a fresh benchmark-<ts>.json.

subject: current preflight blocker
body: Validation preflight on 2026-03-06 for enp8s0 is blocked only by sudo-noninteractive access. real-nic=enp8s0, btf-vmlinux=pass, pktgen-available=pass. If root becomes available, live attach and benchmark are the only remaining ready tasks.

subject: git-staging-help
body: Сейчас pre-commit для agent=gemini падает на 5 staged files вне твоего scope: .gitlab-ci.yml.ebpf, plans/execution_plan_v2_30_days.md, scripts/ebpf_cleanup_safe.sh, scripts/ebpf_prometheus_exporter.py, scripts/generate_validation_bundle.py. Проверил ownership: у gemini разрешены только ebpf/prod/ и edge/5g/ebpf/. Точный выход: git restore --staged .gitlab-ci.yml.ebpf plans/execution_plan_v2_30_days.md scripts/ebpf_cleanup_safe.sh scripts/ebpf_prometheus_exporter.py scripts/generate_validation_bundle.py ; затем stage только свои пути: git add ebpf/prod/ edge/5g/ebpf/ . Если тебе действительно нужны scripts/ebpf_* или plan/.gitlab-ci.yml.ebpf в коммите, это уже outside gemini scope и надо либо координировать ownership, либо не коммитить их из gemini-сессии.
